environment.layout: isolated default panel plus explicit compact layout
environment.rtl: requested live but shell did not mirror; offscreen matrix passed

automatedEvidence.observation: Structural, offscreen, source archive, RPM build, rpmlint, and disposable package filesystem checks passed.

liveCases.observation: The theme applied in an isolated KWin/Plasma Wayland session without changing the maintainer desktop.
The panel configuration hash and panel count were identical before and after Global Theme application.
The isolated 40 px panel rendered at bottom, top, left, and right without a visible seam.
Solid and translucent assets pass structural checks, but the virtual framebuffer cannot prove blur quality.
liveCases.blocker: No isolated hardware-composited blur output is available.

liveCases.observation: System Settings rendered with the native NoxForge Qt style and Aurorae decoration at 100 and 140 percent.
Focus rendering passes offscreen; keyboard-only interaction is not exercised.
liveCases.blocker: The isolated compositor has no keyboard-injection tool.

liveCases.observation: RTL Qt geometry passes offscreen; live Plasma mirroring is not exercised.
liveCases.blocker: The requested live RTL environment did not mirror the Plasma shell.

liveCases.observation: The isolated Plasma desktop, panel, launcher icons, wallpaper, and system-tray surfaces rendered without visible missing artwork.
Aurorae sprite states validate structurally; KWin composition is not exercised.
liveCases.blocker: Keyboard/pointer injection is unavailable for hover, pressed, inactive, and maximized transitions.
A held Alt+Tab cycle cannot be injected into the isolated compositor.

liveCases.observation: Required panel icons remained distinct and legible on horizontal and vertical live panels; the optical-size contact sheet covers exact sizes.
Physical cursor files and animation frames validate; live compositor scaling is not exercised.
liveCases.blocker: The virtual compositor exposes no controllable pointer for live scale captures.

liveCases.observation: PipeWire routed the volume event successfully and its true peak measured -18.1 dBFS.
The real lock greeter testing mode, logout greeter, and splash process rendered successfully; each capture is indexed in live-session.md.
KWin composed two independent 1280 by 720 virtual Wayland outputs without panel or wallpaper placement failure.
The real SDDM greeter rendered the NoxForge theme in test mode, including user, session, input, and power surfaces.
liveCases.blocker: Test mode cannot prove PAM authentication or real power actions, and the maintainer login screen was not changed.
